name: Condeco Workspace Scheduling API
what_it_does: Condeco REST API for workplace management and workspace scheduling platform. Enables AI agents to query desk and meeting room availability, create bookings, retrieve occupancy data, and integrate workspace scheduling into hybrid work and facilities management workflows. Condeco is an enterprise workplace scheduling solution used by large organizations.
use_cases: Querying desk and meeting room availability from workplace assistant agents
Creating and managing workspace bookings from hybrid work coordination agents
Retrieving occupancy analytics from facilities management agents
Integrating Condeco workspace data into calendar and HR system agents
not_for: Small business without enterprise workplace needs
best_when: A large enterprise using Condeco wants AI agents to help employees find and book desks/rooms, analyze workspace utilization, and integrate space data into hybrid work workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Workspace booking data reveals employee presence patterns and location. Handle with appropriate data governance.

auth.notes: Condeco API authentication via API key or OAuth. Enterprise access required. Contact Condeco for API developer access. Documentation not publicly available.

pricing.notes: Enterprise-only platform. Pricing negotiated with Condeco sales. Condeco was acquired by Eptura.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Workspace booking data reveals employee presence and location patterns
No public MCP server — enterprise API integration required
Condeco acquired by Eptura — verify API stability and future roadmap
Public API documentation not available — enterprise customers only
Consider Robin Powered for more developer-friendly workspace API alternative
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee presence and location data from bookings. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API. Eptura acquisition may affect product direction.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee presence data. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API.
